title_zh: 实时换脸 · 绝色主播上线
title_en: Real-time face swap · flawless streamer look
desc_zh: 右上角真人小窗与大画面超级美女逐帧同步，笑容、飞吻、说话口型完全一致，脸以外的一切都对得上。概念演示。
desc_en: The real-operator corner window and the stunning main view stay in perfect frame-by-frame sync — smiles, kisses and lip movements all match. Concept demo.
